runs.change_note: Changed world biomes to safe/danger food-pressure zones with durability damage from danger areas
Made brain more useful: added short-term memory, danger avoidance, and smarter path selection
Added brain-based cooperation: ally memory, signaling, flocking, role assignment, planning, and social event logs
Added life stages, safe-area reproduction rules, adult-only reproduction, minimum health requirement, and child support near parent/group
Added parental care: parents/caretakers stay near children, prioritize child support, and log births
Added food progression with cooking bonuses, large-animal team hunting, child growth by diet, and brain-4 food sharing
Retuned team hunting so cooperative pairs/groups form more easily and can execute large-animal hunts with stricter teamwork than solo agents
Expanded body search to include brain-4 cooks/sharers and documented the new multi-stage food plus team-hunting rules
Nerfed raw plants hard, boosted cooked food tiers, and replaced lone large prey with herd animals that move, guard calves, and scatter under hunting pressure
Added family unit system with parent recognition, child dependency radius, parent-child bond strength, and search/protect/share behaviors for offspring
Added nest construction for brain-3+ agents, tied reproduction to nest proximity, and made nests reduce danger and passive drain for settlement survival
Added nest food storage, surplus depositing, and family food withdrawal so settlements can create real resource buffers instead of only safety bonuses
Added memory maps for food sources, safe zones, and nest locations so brains can route more efficiently and reduce wasted movement energy
Added Technology Tier 1 with nest material gathering plus knife, spear, and sickle crafting to make brains convert resources into better hunting and harvesting
Made tools purpose-driven: need-based crafting, spear-led hunting behavior, sickle-led harvest routes, knife-based defense, and experiment summaries for gathered materials and crafted tools
Added shared-home oriented roles, persistent role identities, nest-centered behavior, and food redistribution so groups act more like early family settlements

Strengthened attachment and lineage survival: easier nest births with care support, stronger parent-child food sacrifice, protector escalation for vulnerable children, and wait-for-teammates hunting behavior
Added nursery protection, nest bootstrap food surplus, protector targets, safer home reproduction windows, and lower child isolation inside nest zones
Fixed brain-driven path scoring bug and added matured-child tracking to measure true lineage progress
Started founder population as true adults instead of orphaned children so lineage systems can activate without lowering world difficulty
Added cooperative nest construction and shared-home nest ownership so brain-led groups can found settlements without lowering world danger
Added safe-zone settlement targeting for brain-rich founders and lowered nest founding cost through planning plus cooperative labor
Spawned founders as local bands, with high-brain cohorts starting together in safe high-food terrain so social and settlement strategies can actually engage
Converted successful hunts into immediate settlement attempts for high-brain groups and fixed shared-nest food storage ownership
Made high-brain founders prioritize building a safe settlement before large-animal hunting, and reduced local build material needs at chosen settlement sites
Allowed planned safe-site nest construction to use cognition and coordinated labor instead of requiring nearby plant tokens, while keeping world danger unchanged
Multi-seed search for 50 distinct surviving body types without lowering world difficulty; stop after long stagnation if no new body plans appear
Fast smoke test for massive lineage search
Massive lineage search for 50 body types with scalable population but unchanged world difficulty
Massive lineage search with niche-expansion trait variants
Massive lineage search for 50 body types with niche-expansion trait variants and scalable populations
Smoke test for massive lineage search with scalable founder populations and lineage success criteria
Dashboard smoke test
Dashboard smoke test v2
Manual test run

Readable log smoke test
